description_long: This is an adult male pedestrian dressed in casual urban attire, featuring a beanie hat, a short-sleeve t-shirt layered over a long-sleeve shirt, and fitted jeans. The figure's arms are extended horizontally, revealing wrist accessories and a watch on the left wrist. The individual is wearing sturdy shoes suitable for walking on city streets. His facial features are visible from the front, with a trimmed beard and a relaxed expression. The overall build is average, and the clothing fits comfortably, suggesting readiness for everyday urban activities. The asset is detailed with realistic folds in the clothing and natural body proportions.
description: A casually dressed adult male pedestrian with a beanie, layered shirts, jeans, and sturdy shoes, arms extended. Realistic urban attire and natural body proportions.
description_view_0: Front view showing facial features, beanie, layered shirts, wrist accessories, and full frontal detail of clothing and shoes.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the beanie, nose, and the layered shirt sleeves, as well as the side of the shoes.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the beanie, shirt, jeans, and shoes, with hair visible beneath the hat.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, beanie, and the right arm's accessories, as well as the side of the shoes.
attribute_clothing_type: casual t-shirt layered over a long-sleeve shirt, fitted jeans, beanie hat, and wrist accessories
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
